---
title: "Eugene, Oregon Rate Setting"
year: 2011
image: /images/eugene_OR.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Eugene, Oregon"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

Since 2010 Bell & Associates has assisted the City with the annual cost and operational review of the City’s six licensed haulers as well developing the method used to calculate collection rates. The new approach was in response to the implementation of new programs being considered by the City. During 2011, Mr. Bell assisted City staff with an updated rate schedule for residential, commercial, and drop box service as well as the implementation of a commercial food waste collection program.

[By Oregon Department of Transportation - Whilamut Passage Bridge, CC BY 2.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=147577747)
:::
